mapper.sql: AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nx_platform_order_assign poa WHERE poa.nx_poa_order_id = dor.nx_department_orders_id AND poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM' AND poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: select * from nx_department_orders as dor left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dg.nx_distributer_goods_id = dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id where nx_department_orders_id = #{value}
select count(*) from nx_department_orders

select * from nx_department_orders as dor left join nx_department_dis_goods as ddg on ddg.nx_department_dis_goods_id = dor.nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dg.nx_distributer_goods_id = dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id where nx_DO_bill_id = #{billId} and dor.nx_DO_return_status = 0

select dor.*, dg.*, COALESCE(nd_dis.nx_distributer_show_name, nd_dis.nx_distributer_name) as goods_nx_distributer_name from nx_department_orders as dor left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer as nd_dis on nd_dis.nx_distributer_id = dg.nx_dg_distributer_id where dor.nx_DO_ocr_task_id = #{ocrTaskId} order by dor.nx_DO_today_order

select dor.*, dg.*, COALESCE(nd_dis.nx_distributer_show_name, nd_dis.nx_distributer_name) as goods_nx_distributer_name from nx_department_orders as dor left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer as nd_dis on nd_dis.nx_distributer_id = dg.nx_dg_distributer_id where dor.nx_DO_ocr_task_id = #{ocrTaskId} order by dor.nx_DO_today_order
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from nx_department_orders where nx_DO_ocr_task_id = #{ocrTaskId}

select COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nx_DO_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as completedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nx_DO_status = -2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as pendingCount from nx_department_orders where nx_DO_ocr_task_id = #{ocrTaskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_department_order_history (`nx_department_orders_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_price`, `nx_DO_quantity`, `nx_DO_standard`, `nx_DO_remark`, `nx_DO_weight`, `nx_DO_weight_kg`, `nx_DO_price`, `nx_DO_price_kg`, `nx_DO_subtotal`, `nx_DO_department_id`, `nx_DO_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_user_id`, `nx_DO_bill_id`, `nx_DO_status`, `nx_DO_order_user_id`, `nx_DO_pick_user_id`, `nx_DO_account_user_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_status`, `nx_DO_apply_date`, `nx_DO_arrive_date`, `nx_DO_purchase_goods_id`, `nx_DO_arrive_only_date`, `nx_DO_apply_full_time`, `nx_DO_goods_type`, `nx_DO_operation_time`, `nx_DO_arrive_what_day`, `nx_DO_is_agent`, `nx_DO_arrive_weeks_year`, `nx_DO_apply_only_time`, `nx_DO_cost_price`, `nx_DO_cost_subtotal`, `nx_DO_gb_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_return_weight`, `nx_DO_return_subtotal`, `nx_DO_return_bill_id`, `nx_DO_return_status`, `nx_DO_weight_id`, `nx_DO_profit_subtotal`, `nx_DO_profit_scale`, `nx_DO_nx_community_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_father_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_order_id`, `nx_DO_nx_restraunt_order_id`, `nx_DO_training_data_id`, `nx_DO_ocr_task_id`, `nx_DO_cost_price_update`, `nx_DO_cost_price_level`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_grand_id`, `nx_DO_print_standard`, `nx_DO_today_order`, `nx_DO_price_different`, `nx_DO_expect_price`, `nx_DO_goods_name`, `nx_DO_goods_original_name`, `nx_DO_gb_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id`) SELECT `nx_department_orders_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_price`, `nx_DO_quantity`, `nx_DO_standard`, `nx_DO_remark`, `nx_DO_weight`, `nx_DO_weight_kg`, `nx_DO_price`, `nx_DO_price_kg`, `nx_DO_subtotal`, `nx_DO_department_id`, `nx_DO_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_user_id`, `nx_DO_bill_id`, `nx_DO_status`, `nx_DO_order_user_id`, `nx_DO_pick_user_id`, `nx_DO_account_user_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_status`, `nx_DO_apply_date`, `nx_DO_arrive_date`, `nx_DO_purchase_goods_id`, `nx_DO_arrive_only_date`, `nx_DO_apply_full_time`, `nx_DO_goods_type`, `nx_DO_operation_time`, `nx_DO_arrive_what_day`, `nx_DO_is_agent`, `nx_DO_arrive_weeks_year`, `nx_DO_apply_only_time`, `nx_DO_cost_price`, `nx_DO_cost_subtotal`, `nx_DO_gb_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_return_weight`, `nx_DO_return_subtotal`, `nx_DO_return_bill_id`, `nx_DO_return_status`, `nx_DO_weight_id`, `nx_DO_profit_subtotal`, `nx_DO_profit_scale`, `nx_DO_nx_community_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_father_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_order_id`, `nx_DO_nx_restraunt_order_id`, `nx_DO_training_data_id`, `nx_DO_ocr_task_id`, `nx_DO_cost_price_update`, `nx_DO_cost_price_level`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_grand_id`, `nx_DO_print_standard`, `nx_DO_today_order`, `nx_DO_price_different`, `nx_DO_expect_price`, `nx_DO_goods_name`, `nx_DO_goods_original_name`, `nx_DO_gb_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id` FROM nx_department_orders WHERE nx_department_orders_id = #{nxDepartmentOrdersId}

INSERT INTO nx_department_orders (`nx_department_orders_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_price`, `nx_DO_quantity`, `nx_DO_standard`, `standard_weight`, `item_unit`, `items_per_carton`, `carton_unit`, `nx_DO_remark`, `nx_DO_weight`, `nx_DO_weight_kg`, `nx_DO_price`, `nx_DO_price_kg`, `nx_DO_subtotal`, `nx_DO_department_id`, `nx_DO_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_bill_id`, `nx_DO_status`, `nx_DO_order_user_id`, `nx_DO_pick_user_id`, `nx_DO_account_user_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_user_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_goods_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_status`, `nx_DO_apply_date`, `nx_DO_arrive_date`, `nx_DO_arrive_only_date`, `nx_DO_apply_full_time`, `nx_DO_operation_time`, `nx_DO_arrive_what_day`, `nx_DO_is_agent`, `nx_DO_arrive_weeks_year`, `nx_DO_apply_only_time`, `nx_DO_cost_price`, `nx_DO_cost_subtotal`, `nx_DO_gb_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_return_weight`, `nx_DO_return_subtotal`, `nx_DO_return_bill_id`, `nx_DO_return_status`, `nx_DO_weight_id`, `nx_DO_profit_subtotal`, `nx_DO_profit_scale`, `nx_DO_nx_community_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_father_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_order_id`, `nx_DO_nx_restraunt_order_id`, `nx_DO_training_data_id`, `nx_DO_ocr_task_id`, `nx_DO_cost_price_update`, `nx_DO_cost_price_level`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_grand_id`, `nx_DO_goods_type`, `nx_DO_print_standard`, `nx_DO_today_order`, `nx_DO_price_different`, `nx_DO_expect_price`, `nx_DO_goods_name`, `nx_DO_goods_original_name`, `nx_DO_gb_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id`) SELECT `nx_department_orders_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_id`, `nx_DO_nx_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_father_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_dep_dis_goods_price`, `nx_DO_quantity`, `nx_DO_standard`, `standard_weight`, `item_unit`, `items_per_carton`, `carton_unit`, `nx_DO_remark`, `nx_DO_weight`, `nx_DO_weight_kg`, `nx_DO_price`, `nx_DO_price_kg`, `nx_DO_subtotal`, `nx_DO_department_id`, `nx_DO_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_bill_id`, `nx_DO_status`, `nx_DO_order_user_id`, `nx_DO_pick_user_id`, `nx_DO_account_user_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_user_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_goods_id`, `nx_DO_purchase_status`, `nx_DO_apply_date`, `nx_DO_arrive_date`, `nx_DO_arrive_only_date`, `nx_DO_apply_full_time`, `nx_DO_operation_time`, `nx_DO_arrive_what_day`, `nx_DO_is_agent`, `nx_DO_arrive_weeks_year`, `nx_DO_apply_only_time`, `nx_DO_cost_price`, `nx_DO_cost_subtotal`, `nx_DO_gb_distributer_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_father_id`, `nx_DO_return_weight`, `nx_DO_return_subtotal`, `nx_DO_return_bill_id`, `nx_DO_return_status`, `nx_DO_weight_id`, `nx_DO_profit_subtotal`, `nx_DO_profit_scale`, `nx_DO_nx_community_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id`, `nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_father_id`, `nx_DO_gb_department_order_id`, `nx_DO_nx_restraunt_order_id`, `nx_DO_training_data_id`, `nx_DO_ocr_task_id`, `nx_DO_cost_price_update`, `nx_DO_cost_price_level`, `nx_DO_dis_goods_grand_id`, `nx_DO_goods_type`, `nx_DO_print_standard`, `nx_DO_today_order`, `nx_DO_price_different`, `nx_DO_expect_price`, `nx_DO_goods_name`, `nx_DO_goods_original_name`, `nx_DO_gb_dep_dis_goods_id`, `nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id` FROM nx_department_order_history WHERE nx_department_orders_id = #{nxDepartmentOrdersId}
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_department_orders where nx_department_orders_id in
#{nxDepartmentOrdersId}
mapper.select: select distinct ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer_seq, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer_last, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = #{disGoodsId} and ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id != #{currentShelfGoodsId} order by ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort
select max(nx_DO_today_order) from nongxinle.nx_department_orders where nx_DO_department_father_id = #{depIdForTodayOrder}
select * from nongxinle.nx_department_orders where nx_DO_nx_restraunt_order_id = #{nxDoNxRestrauntOrderId}
